response.overview: Arif and Mazwin meet their soulmates in shocking circumstances when they are married without planning. They become substitute bride and groom at the last minute because the original couple, Harishah and Natasha, run away on the night of the wedding ceremony. Despite not knowing each other, only making eye contact while exchanging rings, love continues to exist between them. However, their happiness is tested with the appearance of Natasha and Harishah who supposedly want to claim their rights after being disappointed with their respective loves.
response.title: Pengantin Tangkap Muat
